decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_mta-nyct already matches existing registry record entity_mta-nyct (MTA NYCT Reference, entity_type: agency, entity_name: MTA New York City Transit). Observation already resolves to this id — no different target to link to.

Observation base_record_id entity_nyc-dot already matches existing registry record entity_nyc-dot (NYC DOT as Publisher, entity_type: agency, entity_name: New York City Department of Transportation). Observation already resolves to this id.

Observation base_record_id entity_manhattan-borough-president already matches existing registry record entity_manhattan-borough-president (Manhattan Borough President, entity_type: government_office). Observation already resolves to this id.

Observation base_record_id entity_janette-sadik-khan-2009 already matches existing registry record entity_janette-sadik-khan-2009 (Janette Sadik-Khan, entity_type: person). Observation already resolves to this id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Voice of Janette Sadik-Khan Commissioner of New York City Department of Transportation

proposed_relations.description: Janette Sadik-Khan is identified as Commissioner of the New York City Department of Transportation in the May 2009 CAC meeting presentation.
